framework.name: uk_ai_regulation
framework.description: UK DSIT pro-innovation regulatory framework — five cross-sectoral principles for AI applied through existing regulators.

controls.name: uk-1
controls.description: AI systems should function in a robust, secure and safe way throughout their lifecycle.

controls.name: uk-2
controls.description: Outputs and decision-making processes are explained appropriately.

controls.name: uk-3
controls.description: AI systems must comply with UK laws and not undermine rights of individuals.

controls.name: uk-4
controls.description: Governance measures ensure effective oversight of AI systems with clear accountability.

controls.name: uk-5
controls.description: Users and affected parties can contest harmful AI outcomes.
